sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Speed Setting System
special_mechanics.description: Player ship has adjustable speed across four levels that can be increased or decreased at button press

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Modifiable weapon loadout with defaults (Twin Shot, Back Shot) plus collectible alternatives. Single weapon lost on destruction at default difficulty

special_mechanics.name: CLAWs (Support Drones)
special_mechanics.description: Automatic support units (max 2) that mimic ship and fire same weapon. Lost on destruction at all difficulties

special_mechanics.name: Horizontal Scrolling Flight
special_mechanics.description: Replaced previous free-directional overhead format with horizontally scrolling stage design

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Thunder Force III is a shoot-em-up (shmup) rather than a platformer, so traditional platformer physics parameters (jump, gravity, acceleration) do not apply. Available documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics and weapon systems rather than precise movement physics. The game features adjustable speed settings and responsive ship control, typical of arcade-style shooters of the era.
